message:
The power flickered twice this week and it reminded me we're not as ready as I'd like. Found a clear little outage guide on Ready.gov — flashlights over candles, how long the fridge stays cold, a way to charge your phone.

How long could your house go without power before it got rough?
error_reason: Conferma la tua identità prima di poter pubblicare come questa Pagina. Apri l'app Facebook sul tuo telefono e segui le istruzioni.
